achievements.description: Show all 5 requested Pokémon to Bill's grandfather on Route 25.

achievements.description: Receive a Pass for the Magnet Train from the Copycat in Saffron City.

achievements.description: Collect all 3 of the fishing rods.

achievements.description: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Johto.

achievements.description: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Kanto.

achievements.description: Catch all 206 possible Pokémon that are obtainable in-game without external devices.
